raw_consumer_statement:
We recently booked a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX through Amex XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX at a total confirmed rate of {$1000.00}. This amount included a base rate of {$850.00}, taxes and fees of {$94.00}, and an additional on-site charge of $ XXXX shown in my XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  which is attached hereto. 
However, upon checkout, we were presented with a final bill totaling $ XXXX {$290.00} more than the confirmed amount. We requested a breakdown to understand the discrepancy, and the hotel provided the attached folio. Upon review, we noticed that the nightly base rates listed ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX ) are significantly higher than our confirmed rate, even when accounting for exchange rates as of XX/XX/XXXX. Additionally, the {$100.00} XXXX property credit as advertised in Amexs fine hotel reservation program appears to have not been applied. 

We reached out to Amex twice asking for an explanation of the discrepancy but got no answer.
